title: quercus pubescens var. lanuginosa
intro: Quercus pubescens var. lanuginosa, also known as the downy white oak, is a variety of deciduous tree in the Quercus genus. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus pubescens var. lanuginosa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
